calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for James Eby.

Mr. Madden stated that he has not heard from anyone. The Petition for Instructions was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Trustee. Robert Eby, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has no difficulty with correction of paragraph E(3) (a) and (b) but that it is not appropriate to order distribution in Robert, Sr.'s Trust. The Court also informed Mr. Madden that fees need to be requested in a petition and notice needs to be given to everyone. Mr. Eby, Jr. spoke of his medical condition, stated that he is having difficulty understanding the petition, that he has no funds to hire an Attorney and asked to have Counsel appointed for him. The Court explained that it has no ability in this matter to appoint an Attorney. The Petition for Instructions was continued to October 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Eby, Jr. to hire Counsel and or speak with Mr. Madden regarding explanation of the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Dana Di Basilio Tognini, CSR#10118, (415) 398-1889. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Reported)
